narrative:
New Franklin 1-B (precinct in Summit County) has 837 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points.
